'''√n-ch-t''' ('''kanachat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:larvicide|larvicide]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:larvicide|larvicide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √n-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| kanachat
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thinachat || jinachat || shinachat || kinachat
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthunachat || jujunachat || shushunachat || kukunachat
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thunachat || junachat || shunachat || kunachat
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thunachat || junachat || shunachat || kunachat
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thenachat || jenachat || shenachat || kenachat
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothonachat || jojonachat || shoshonachat || kokonachat
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thonachat || jonachat || shonachat || konachat
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thonachat || jonachat || shonachat || konachat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || nachat || nachat || nachat || nachat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || nachat || nachat || nachat || nachat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || nachat || nachat || nachat || nachat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || nachat || nachat || nachat || nachat
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thænachat || jænachat || shænachat || kænachat
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathanachat || jajanachat || shashanachat || kakanachat
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thanachat || janachat || shanachat || kanachat
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thanachat || janachat || shanachat || kanachat
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shanachat
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshanachat
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishanachat
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shanachatnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshanachatnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishanachatnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shanachatshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshanachatnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishanachatshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shanachatro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshanachatnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishanachatro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shanachatmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshanachatnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishanachatmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shanachatsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshanachatnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishanachatsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shanachatng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshanachatnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishanachatng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shanachatya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshanachatnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishanachatya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shanachatyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshanachatnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishanachatyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shanachatnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshanachatnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishanachatnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shanachatnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanachatnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanachatnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shanachatnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshanachatnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanachatnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shanachatshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshanachatnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishanachatshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shanachatshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanachatnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanachatshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shanachatshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshanachatnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanachatshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shanachatronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshanachatnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishanachatronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shanachatroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshanachatnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishanachatroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shanachatromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshanachatnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanachatromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shanachatmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshanachatnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishanachatmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shanachatmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshanachatnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishanachatmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shanachatmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanachatnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanachatmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
